summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of EchoBiz voice-first digital ledger MVP. All core features working correctly including user authentication, natural language command processing with OpenAI GPT-4o, transaction management, and data visualization.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for successful registration
minor_bugs.impact: Functional but incorrect HTTP status code

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access

Expense command processing with natural language understanding
Inventory tracking and updates after sales
Transaction history display with proper categorization
Navigation between Dashboard, Summary, Inventory, and History pages
Real-time data synchronization across all pages
Responsive UI design following brand guidelines

success_percentage.backend: 78% (7/9 tests passed - minor status code issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor backend HTTP status codes: (1) Return 201 instead of 200 for successful registration, (2) Return 401 instead of 403 for unauthorized requests. These are non-critical fixes as all functionality works correctly.
